{{Item
| image = Conan suit.png
| id = conan_suit
| type = Customization
| Subtype = Non-dyeable
| stackable = 64
}}

'''Conan Suit''' is a non-dyable equipable item that makes your dog cosplay a very famous anime/manga character.

[[File:Conan suit display.png|frameless|606x606px]]

== Obtaining ==
=== Crafting ===
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Ingredients
! Recipe ''(shapeless)''
|-
| Bowtie <br>+ Paper<br>+ Blue Dye<br>+ Yellow Dye<br>+ White Dye<br>+ Red Dye<br>+ Leather Boots<br>+ Guard Suit
| [[File:Conan suit crafting.png]]
|}

== Usage ==
{{Accessory_use}}
== Trivia ==
* It was introduced in DTN 1.12.0.
* A direct reference to '''Shinichi Kudo/Edogawa Conan''' from the manga series '''Case Closed''', also known as '''Detective Conan'''.<ref>https://www.imdb.com/title/tt0131179/</ref>

<references />
